final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a steampunk mechanical device with complex gears, pipes, and gauges (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "蒸汽朋克" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Jules Verne novel illustrations, 19th-century industrial engineering diagrams, Victorian brass instrument craftsmanship; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include complex gears, pipes, and gauges as the focal mechanical elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a brass and copper dominant direction — exact metal tones and patina are yours
Materials/textures: needs a Victorian-era ornamental surface treatment — exact brass/copper sheen and decorative detail level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
